description: Fragment from a document, perhaps a letter, mentioning prices in dirhams and several names, such as Ibn Ḥusayn and Sulaymān, and days, such as Wednesday and Friday. In the hand of Yefet b. David b. Shekhanya. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
